f0194bec861eccd5c9136cbc90b2513277e7a8485","dweb:/ipfs/QmWEjPpLKRu1wkXHmvXFqWCBuNjGxkdDFhgodJk2noKPeS"]}},"version":1}

params._admin: New owner of the proxy contract.
Address of the initial contract admin. Admin has the ability to access the               transparent proxy interface.

params._data: Calldata to delegatecall the new implementation with.

admin().notice: Gets the owner of the proxy contract.

changeAdmin(address).notice: Changes the owner of the proxy contract. Only callable by the owner.

constructor.notice: Sets the initial admin during contract deployment. Admin address is stored at the         EIP-1967 admin storage slot so that accidental storage collision with the         implementation is not possible.

upgradeTo(address).notice: Set the implementation contract address. The code at the given address will execute         when this contract is called.

upgradeToAndCall(address,bytes).notice: Set the implementation and call a function in a single transaction. Useful to ensure         atomic execution of initialization-based upgrades.

admin().notice: Gets the owner of the proxy contract.

changeAdmin(address).notice: Changes the owner of the proxy contract. Only callable by the owner.

constructor.notice: Sets the initial admin during contract deployment. Admin address is stored at the         EIP-1967 admin storage slot so that accidental storage collision with the         implementation is not possible.

upgradeTo(address).notice: Set the implementation contract address. The code at the given address will execute         when this contract is called.

upgradeToAndCall(address,bytes).notice: Set the implementation and call a function in a single transaction. Useful to ensure         atomic execution of initialization-based upgrades.

AdminChanged(address,address).notice: An event that is emitted each time the owner is upgraded. This event is part of the         EIP-1967 specification.

Upgraded(address).notice: An event that is emitted each time the implementation is changed. This event is part         of the EIP-1967 specification.

userdoc.notice: Proxy is a transparent proxy that passes through the call if the caller is the owner or         if the caller is address(0), meaning that the call originated from an off-chain         simulation.

params._admin: New owner of the proxy contract.
Address of the initial contract admin. Admin has the ability to access the               transparent proxy interface.

params._data: Calldata to delegatecall the new implementation with.

params.newAdmin: The new owner of the contract
params.previousAdmin: The previous owner of the contract

params.implementation: The address of the implementation contract

documentation.text:
@notice A modifier that reverts if not called by the owner or by address(0) to allow
         eth_call to interact with this proxy without needing to use low-level storage
         inspection. We assume that nobody is able to trigger calls from address(0) during
         normal EVM execution.

typeDescriptions.typeString: literal_string "Proxy: delegatecall to new implementation contract failed"

arguments.value: Proxy: delegatecall to new implementation contract failed

argumentTypes.typeString: literal_string "Proxy: delegatecall to new implementation contract failed"

documentation.text:

 @param _admin New owner of the proxy contract.

@notice Gets the owner of the proxy contract.
 @return Owner address.

@notice Sets the implementation address.
 @param _implementation New implementation address.

@notice Changes the owner of the proxy contract.
 @param _admin New owner of the proxy contract.
@notice Performs the proxy call via a delegatecall.

@notice Queries the implementation address.
 @return Implementation address.

@notice Queries the owner of the proxy contract.
 @return Owner address.
